ab: pito ko toki tahiraay to kako i pitilidan anini.
en: I arrived at school at seven today.

ab: pisatapangan to a minanam, micomoday to ko singsi i laloma’ no pitilidan, “katomireng, mita’ong” sa ko kakeridan.
ch: 上課了，老師走進教室，班長說:「起立!敬禮!」
en: It’s time for class , the teacher walked into the classroom, and the monitor said: “Stand up! Salute!”

ab: sata’angay sa ko ngiha niyam a pasowal to “nga’ay ho singsi.”
to pinanaman i, pasifana’en no singsi kami to sa’osi no ’Amis.
ch: 上課的時候，老師教我們數字的族語。
en: In class, the teacher taught us the ’Amis language of numbers.

ab: todongan niyam ko pisa’osi no singsi, radiwan niyam ko sa’osi.
ch: 我們跟著老師唸，我們唱了數字歌。
en: We followed the teacher to read, we sang the number song.

ab: adihay to ko kafana’an no mako to sowal no ’Amis.
mitilid kako to romi’ami’ad, minanam kako to sowal no ’Amis to romi’ami’ad, papitengilen ako ci ina to sowal ako.
ch: 我天天上學，我天天學族語，我要講給媽媽聽。
en: I go to school every day, I learn the ’Amis language every day, and I want to tell my mother.
